[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001010000 2
1 0000000110 2
2 0110000000 2
3 0000010000 1
4 1101101101 7
5 0010101110 5
6 0011110000 4
7 0001010101 4
